description: Read-only MCP for Microsoft SQL Server: metadata discovery, parameterized SELECT, plans.
name: io.github.alyiox/mcp-mssql

environmentVariables.description: Default profile SQL Server connection string (often contains secrets). Optional if profiles are only in user appsettings.
environmentVariables.name: MCPMSSQL_CONNECTION_STRING

environmentVariables.description: Optional human-readable description for the default profile.
environmentVariables.name: MCPMSSQL_DESCRIPTION

environmentVariables.description: Max rows per interactive query (default 500; ceiling 1000).
environmentVariables.name: MCPMSSQL_QUERY_MAX_ROWS

environmentVariables.description: Interactive query command timeout in seconds (default 30).
environmentVariables.name: MCPMSSQL_QUERY_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_SECONDS

environmentVariables.description: Max rows for snapshot queries (default 10000; ceiling 50000).
environmentVariables.name: MCPMSSQL_QUERY_SNAPSHOT_MAX_ROWS

environmentVariables.description: Execution plan analysis timeout in seconds (default 300).
environmentVariables.name: MCPMSSQL_ANALYZE_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_SECONDS

environmentVariables.description: Set to Development to load dotnet user-secrets (local dev).
environmentVariables.name: DOTNET_ENVIRONMENT

title: Microsoft SQL Server
